subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of one of the leaves who broke the Covenant when the horizons were darkened, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان القلم الاعلی یذکر ورقه من الاوراق التی مانقضت المیثاق اذ اظلمت الافاق یا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
